title: Narathiwat Heat Wave
lead: Narathiwat is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.71. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions.
body:
The heat wave in Narathiwat is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) value of 12.0 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 71%, and the wind speed is 6.6 km/h, contributing to the oppressive heat. 
 The lack of precipitation and high temperatures are exacerbating the heat wave, with a Heating Degree Day (HDD) value of 0.0 GG.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave response protocols immediately.
